introSection: Little Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Castle Park in Riverside, California, USA. It was built by Miler Manufacturing and had an oval layout.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Little Dipper opened in 1987, and last operated in 2020. The ride was removed from the park in 2023.

fullText:
Little Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Castle Park in Riverside, California, USA. It was built by Miler Manufacturing and had an oval layout.

Little Dipper opened in 1987, and last operated in 2020. The ride was removed from the park in 2023.
